usage: addRing [-help] [-around {each_block each_reef power_domain default_power_domain selected cluster shared_cluster user_defined}] [-center <0|1>] [-exclude_selected <0|1>] [-extend_corner [tl tr bl br lt lb rt rb]] [-follow {core io}] [-jog_distance <real_value>] -nets <name-or-value> [-offset_adjustment {automatic fixed}] [-rectangle <0|1>] [-skip_side {top bottom left right}] [-snap_wire_center_to_grid {None Grid Half_Grid Either}] [-threshold {value|auto}] [-type {core_rings block_rings}] [-uda <subclass_string>] [-use_interleaving_wire_group <0|1>] [-use_wire_group <0|1>] [-use_wire_group_bits <value>] [-use_wire_group_reinforcement <0|1>] [-use_wire_group_reinforcement_group_via <0|1>] [-use_wire_group_reinforcement_spacing_width {spacing width}] [-user_defined_region <x1 y1 x2 y2 ...>] {-layer {layer | {top top_layer bottom bottom_layer left left_layer right right_layer}} } {-width {value | {top top_width bottom bottom_width left left_width right right_width}} } {-spacing {value | {top top_spacing bottom bottom_spacing left left_spacing right right_spacing}} } [-offset {value | {top top_offset bottom bottom_offset left left_offset right right_offset}} ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -around
options.description: {each_block each_reef power_domain default_power_domain selected cluster shared_cluster user_defined} around the objects to create rings

options.name: -center
options.description: the center the core rings between the I/O pads and core boundaries

options.name: -exclude_selected
options.description: exclude seleted objects

options.name: -extend_corner
options.description: [tl tr bl br lt lb rt rb] extends the specified segment of the ring to specified dirction

options.name: -follow
options.description: core rings are placed along the core boundary or the I/O boundary

options.name: -jog_distance
options.description: minimum jog distance

options.name: -layer
options.description: {layer | {top top_layer bottom bottom_layer left left_layer right right_layer}} layer name

options.name: -nets
options.description: net name list

options.name: -offset
options.description: {value | {top top_offset bottom bottom_offset left left_offset right right_offset}} offset value

options.name: -offset_adjustment
options.description: offset adjustment

options.name: -rectangle
options.description: rectangle rings only

options.name: -skip_side
options.description: specify which side will be skipped from creating ring

options.name: -snap_wire_center_to_grid
options.description: {None Grid Half_Grid Either} snap wire center to routing grid

options.name: -spacing
options.description: {value | {top top_spacing bottom bottom_spacing left left_spacing right right_spacing}} spacing value

options.name: -threshold
options.description: merge with pre-routed rings if within spacing threshold

options.name: -type
options.description: the ring type

options.name: -uda
options.description: user defined attribute subclass

options.name: -use_interleaving_wire_group
options.description: interleaving

options.name: -use_wire_group
options.description: connects multiple wires from the same net together

options.name: -use_wire_group_bits
options.description: the net number of the wire group

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement
options.description: reinforcement stripes

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement_group_via
options.description: <0|1> make group vias at ring corner

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement_spacing_width
options.description: {spacing width} specify spacing and width

options.name: -user_defined_region
options.description: the coordinates for a rectilinear region

options.name: -width
options.description: {value | {top top_width bottom bottom_width left left_width right right_width}} width value
